name: orderix
description: Orderix — 365 jours d'agilité mentale. Jeu de puzzles quotidiens.

scripts.env:staging: node set-env.js staging && npx cap sync android
scripts.env:prod: node set-env.js prod && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:dev: npm run env:staging && cd android && gradlew assembleDevDebug
scripts.android:prod: npm run env:prod && cd android && gradlew assembleProdDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run env:prod && cd android && gradlew bundleProdRelease
